name: Moonshine v2 Medium on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip STT predictions from Moonshine Streaming Medium (UsefulSensors/moonshine-streaming-medium) on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips, CPU-only inference, no vocabulary biasing.
model_description: Moonshine Streaming Medium (UsefulSensors/moonshine-streaming-medium), transformers CPU inference, ~266M params, sliding-window Transformer encoder
prediction_schema: clip_id (string), ground_truth (string), prediction (string), wer_local (float), entity_accuracy_local (float or null), latency_ms (float), latency_stage (string: cold_start|warmup|warmed)

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Each line: clip_id, ground_truth, prediction, wer_local, entity_accuracy_local, latency_ms, latency_stage.
